name: createEvent
description: Creates a new event on a Google Calendar. Supports timed events (start/end with dateTime) and all-day events (start/end with date). Set sendUpdates to email invitations to attendees.

dateTime.description: RFC3339 timestamp with timezone offset, e.g. "2026-04-15T14:00:00-08:00". Use this for timed events.

date.description: ISO date "YYYY-MM-DD" for all-day events. Use instead of dateTime.

timeZone.description: IANA timezone like "America/Los_Angeles". Optional when dateTime has an offset.

start.description: Event start. Provide dateTime or date.

end.description: Event end. Provide dateTime or date. For all-day events, end.date is exclusive.

sendUpdates.description: Whether to send email invitations: "all" sends to everyone, "externalOnly" only to non-domain attendees, "none" sends nothing (default).

conferenceData.description: If true, attaches an automatically generated Google Meet link to the event.
